title: Predicting the SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs — With Dick Costolo
summary: Dick Costolo, ex-CEO of Twitter, discusses predictions for SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs, examining how each company's narrative differs, what determines their success, and broader implications for AI platforms and capital allocation in Silicon Valley.
